subcodes.first_line: O people of J! Praise be unto God that ye have attained unto the light of faith. Strive ye now, that haply from the Ocean of Utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اهل بیت ج و لله الحمد بنور ایمان فائز شدید حال جهد نمائید شاید از بحر بیان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement
